title: Dolphin Essence
description: Gives you Dolphin's Grace automatically whenever you have Conduit Power
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c53f672046326b299b697f1a30e90852b64c137.png)

![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d4b052b95ade58ce9e81ba1667ba0692d416b1e.png)

Automatically gives you Dolphin's Grace I whenever you have Conduit Power.

The vanilla Conduit Power effect provides Night Vision, Water Breathing, and a small Haste bonus. This mod extends the functionality and gives you a swimming speed boost through the Dolphin's Grace effect.

![Contact](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecb8a8ad4cdf26d61ec73e6ffbfed4816d2c5b42.png)

This mod has a really simple premise and codebase. Please post bugs, feedback, version requests, or suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/ZCaGkZeb4C).
